subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be the glory of God! That which Ḥaydar-'Alí - upon him be My glory and My loving-kindness and My mercy - [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهاء الله آنچه جناب حیدر علی علیه بهائی و عنایتی و رحمتی
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
